title: [BUG] Package 'tmp' version '^0.2.0' dependency triggers security audit failure
author: natenayya
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Currently, the `tmp` library is versioned in `package.json` to be `^0.2.0`. This is resulting in security audit issues, as described here:

[https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-52f5-9888-hmc6](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-52f5-9888-hmc6)

As noted in the issue above, the `tmp` library needs to be updated to be at least version `0.2.4`.

## The expected behaviour:

No security audit issues.


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

Update `package.json`.

comments.author: alumni
comments.body:
@natenayya This an issue in your own repo, not in `exceljs` :)

But one that `exceljs` should get rid of is `inflight` :)

comments.author: gameroman
comments.body:
Hi, I've forked this into https://github.com/excel-js/exceljs if someone is interested

There is also https://github.com/cjnoname/excelts
